name: tokencodec
description: The lossless prompt and data codec for LLMs: re-encode prompts to a fraction of the tokens and decode back byte-for-byte. One command makes every AI coding agent token-efficient.

scripts.test: node engine.test.mjs && node install.test.mjs && node middleware/compress.test.mjs && node proxy.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: node e2e/accuracy.node.test.mjs && node e2e/claims.test.mjs && node e2e/accuracy.browser.test.mjs
